tweet.text:
Wix at 1x ARR is not a SaaS bloodbath. 

It is a reckoning for businesses that were always just sales and marketing operations dressed up as software.

1. The client-server to SaaS shift was more disruptive than anything AI is doing to software right now. This is incremental. The market is finally pricing it that way.

2. SaaS was never that hard to spin up. When the moat is a sales team and a logo, the multiple compresses. That is not a surprise, that is gravity.

3. The companies that survive this are the ones with complex customer relationships and data sets that cannot be recreated. Wix do

tweet.text:
the new interface is up at

fun.noxa.eth

you can access it directly via brave built-in ens support

or via services like eth limo/link

https://fun.noxa.eth.limo
https://fun.noxa.eth.link

the interface lets you browse a historical snapshot of the tokens launched on noxa in the past, and claim any creator fees, as well as seeing the tokens you launched or where you are the fee receiver

we have pondered for long on the matters of token vamps, and the new token launch spam that has been going on

if crypto as a space has to move forward and improve, the change needs to come from the people

th

sample_posts.text:
Aave adopts Chainlink CCIP for its cross-chain mobile app –
Link
Aave integrated Chainlink's Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) to power its new mobile app. CCIP scored highest on cross-chain security in Llama Risk's updated Aave Risk Framework and is said to introduce no new trust assumptions.
Matters because:
CCIP gives Aave a cross-chain path with a security-first framing, which matters for a major lending protocol.

tweet.text:
NEW: DeFi’s largest lending protocol @aave adopts Chainlink CCIP as the cross-chain infra powering its new mobile app.

This follows @LlamaRisk's updated Aave Risk Framework, where CCIP scored the highest on cross-chain security, introducing no new trust assumptions.

sample_posts.text: https://x.com/computedesk/status/2076996824267637151

tweet.text:
Today we're launching http://gpuspec.io.

Buying or selling GPU capacity means describing the same cluster over and over: model, count, region, fabric, term, price. It's slow to write, easy to garble, and impossible to track once it's been forwarded a few times.

sample_posts.text:
Galaxy Research: Inference Capital Markets
> A new onchain financial layer is emerging around AI inference, using crypto to tokenize compute access, finance GPU infrastructure, and create markets for AI services.
> For now, inference capital markets, both onchain and off, are tiny relative to the growth of the AI industry. For onchain offerings to scale, they have to prove the advantage they bring is sustainable.
Source:
https://www.galaxy.com/insights/research/inference-capital-markets-ai-compute-gpu-futures-onchain-crypto
https://www.galaxy.com/insights/research/inference-capital-markets-ai-compute-gpu-futures-onchain-crypto

sample_posts.text:
Fed rate hike expectations surge on inflation concerns –
Link
Fed Governor Christopher Waller said the FOMC may need to raise rates in the near term if core inflation stays elevated. Markets now price about a 50% chance of a July hike, up from ≈10% days ago. Bitcoin is down 2%+ to around $62,380, while U.S. two-year Treasury yields rose to 4.29%.
Matters because:
Higher-for-longer rates and renewed hike odds add pressure to BTC and the broader risk backdrop.

Aave adopts Chainlink CCIP for its cross-chain mobile app –
Link
Aave integrated Chainlink's Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) to power its new mobile app. CCIP scored highest on cross-chain security in Llama Risk's updated Aave Risk Framework and is said to introduce no new trust assumptions.
Matters because:
CCIP gives Aave a cross-chain path with a security-first framing, which matters for a major lending protocol.

tweet.text:
NEW: DeFi’s largest lending protocol @aave adopts Chainlink CCIP as the cross-chain infra powering its new mobile app.

This follows @LlamaRisk's updated Aave Risk Framework, where CCIP scored the highest on cross-chain security, introducing no new trust assumptions.

sample_posts.text:
🚨
DON'T CONNECT YOUR WALLET TO NOXA (MAIN LAUNCHPAD ON ROBINHOOD CHAIN THAT LAUNCHED THE $CASHCAT MEME), COMMS ON X LOOKS SUSPICIOUS (ANNOUNCES THAT NEW LAUNCHES ARE DISABLED)
SOURCE
SOURCE 2

tweet.text:
the new interface is up at

fun.noxa.eth

you can access it directly via brave built-in ens support

or via services like eth limo/link

https://fun.noxa.eth.limo
https://fun.noxa.eth.link

the interface lets you browse a historical snapshot of the tokens launched on noxa in the past, and claim any creator fees, as well as seeing the tokens you launched or where you are the fee receiver

we have pondered for long on the matters of token vamps, and the new token launch spam that has been going on

if crypto as a space has to move forward and improve, the change needs to come from the people

th

Decentralized AI project Nous Research is raising at least $75 million at a $1.5 billion valuation, with Robot Ventures reportedly leading
https://x.com/theblockco/status/2077022012271411424?s=46

tweet.text:
THE BLOCK: Decentralized AI project Nous Research is raising at least $75 million at a $1.5 billion valuation, with Robot Ventures reportedly leading.

That would value Nous 50% above the $1 billion token valuation it carried after its Paradigm-led Series A last year.

sample_posts.text: https://x.com/slow/status/2077175619859943494

tweet.text:
Wix at 1x ARR is not a SaaS bloodbath. 

It is a reckoning for businesses that were always just sales and marketing operations dressed up as software.

1. The client-server to SaaS shift was more disruptive than anything AI is doing to software right now. This is incremental. The market is finally pricing it that way.

2. SaaS was never that hard to spin up. When the moat is a sales team and a logo, the multiple compresses. That is not a surprise, that is gravity.

3. The companies that survive this are the ones with complex customer relationships and data sets that cannot be recreated. Wix do

sample_posts.text:
Fed rate hike expectations surge on inflation concerns –
Link
Fed Governor Christopher Waller said the FOMC may need to raise rates in the near term if core inflation stays elevated. Markets now price about a 50% chance of a July hike, up from ≈10% days ago. Bitcoin is down 2%+ to around $62,380, while U.S. two-year Treasury yields rose to 4.29%.
Matters because:
Higher-for-longer rates and renewed hike odds add pressure to BTC and the broader risk backdrop.
starting to see the crazy biotech fundraises

EthSystems: Confidential Systems for Institutional Ethereum
An independent, for-profit company, backed by long-term Ethereum-aligned investors.
> EthSystems builds confidential systems for institutional Ethereum, carrying forward the IPTF work as an independent company focused on privacy, protocol design, and commercial execution.
Source:
https://ethsystems.org/blog/introducing-ethsystems/
